tenders.body: The Crop Trust / Power of Diversity Funding Facility
tenders.title: Power of Diversity Grants Program — Climate-Resilient Opportunity Crops (Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda)
tenders.eligibility: Organisations with annual average revenue (2023–2025) exceeding their proposed project budget. Open to NGOs, agri-businesses, research institutions and farmer organisations across Kenya, Tanzania and Uganda.
tenders.notes: Grant program targeting underutilised, climate-resilient crops. Projects must focus on at least one of: productivity improvement via good agricultural practices and seed systems, post-harvest processing, or market access. Applications via Crop Trust portal: croptrust.org/news-events/news/power-of-diversity-grants. Enquiries: powerofdiversitygrants@croptrust.org

tenders.body: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO Tanzania)
tenders.title: Supply and Installation of Walk-In Cold Rooms and Cold Chain Equipment
tenders.eligibility: Registered suppliers and installation contractors with cold chain and refrigeration experience
tenders.notes: Invitation to Bid (ITB) for supply and physical installation of walk-in cold rooms and related cold chain equipment to support agricultural and fisheries preservation across Tanzania. TZT Ref No.: 143114122. Contact FAO Tanzania procurement portal for full bid documents.

tenders.body: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO Tanzania) / AFR100 Initiative
tenders.title: Sustainable Landscape Restoration and Livelihood Development — RFP
tenders.eligibility: Qualified consultancy firms and organisations with experience in landscape restoration, agroforestry and rural livelihood development
tenders.notes: Request for Proposal under the AFR100 Initiative focusing on developing livelihoods through the restoration of sustainable agricultural landscapes in Tanzania. Full RFP available via Tanzania Tenders portal: tanzaniatenders.com

tenders.body: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO Tanzania)
tenders.title: Agricultural Gender Policy Assessment — Individual Consultancy
tenders.eligibility: Individual consultants or consultancy firms with demonstrated expertise in gender policy, agricultural policy analysis and Tanzania's regulatory environment
tenders.notes: Request for Proposal (RFP) seeking a qualified consultant to conduct a comprehensive assessment of gender policies within local agricultural frameworks in Tanzania. Full RFP available via Tanzania Tenders portal: tanzaniatenders.com

tenders.title: Working Jointly in Agriculture — Contractors and Suppliers Sought
tenders.notes: Collaborative agricultural project seeking contractors and suppliers for joint operations in Tanzania. TZT Ref No.: 142413118. Full details via Tanzania Tenders portal: tanzaniatenders.com

tenders.body: Ministry of Agriculture, Animal Industry and Fisheries — Uganda (East Africa funded)
tenders.title: Uganda Climate Smart Agricultural Transformation Project — Invitation for Bids
tenders.eligibility: Qualified contractors, technology providers and agri-businesses with experience in climate-smart agricultural transformation
tenders.notes: Major government-funded initiative calling for bids and expressions of interest to transform Uganda's national agricultural landscape with climate-smart technologies and practices. Project reference P173296. Full documents available via Uganda eProcurement system.
